activity_name: Record the data of the patient

substeps.description: Open the Hospital Information System (HIS) and select the 'New Patient Registration' module.
Enter the patient's basic demographic information into the required fields.
Verify the entered data for accuracy and completeness.
Save the initial patient record in the HIS.

activity_name: Register the SSN of the patient

substeps.description: Request the patient's Social Security Number (SSN) from their official identification document.
Enter the SSN into the designated field in the HIS.
Validate the SSN format and check for any duplicate records.
Confirm the SSN entry and save the record.

activity_name: Register the Name of the patient

substeps.description: Ask the patient for their legal first and middle name(s) as shown on their official ID.
Type the first name into the 'First Name' field in the HIS.
Type the middle name(s) into the 'Middle Name' field in the HIS.
Review the entered name for spelling errors and correct if necessary.

activity_name: Register the Surname of the patient

substeps.description: Ask the patient for their legal surname (family name) as shown on their official ID.
Type the surname into the 'Last Name' field in the HIS.
Verify the spelling against the ID document.
Save the surname entry in the patient record.
Navigate to the 'Print Referral' option in the HIS.
Select the correct patient record and confirm the referral details.
Click 'Print' to generate the referral document on the connected printer.
Retrieve the printed document from the printer and hand it to the patient.

activity_name: Archive the record in file system

substeps.description: Scan any paper documents (e.g., signed forms) using the document scanner.
Attach the scanned files to the patient's electronic record in the HIS.
Mark the registration record as 'Complete' and 'Archived' in the system.
Store the physical documents in the designated filing cabinet for secure retention.
